goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 08:30' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 08:30 and should go to london liverpool street
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and price
